hardening.note: Core parameters frozen after implementation verification. Amendments require version increment + changelog.

trial_tier.description: Trial tier: maximum 2 LLM calls, 3 total turns (user + assistant), 120-second server-side timer

continuous_tier.description: Continuous tier: maximum 6 LLM calls, 7 total turns, 30-minute server-side timer

enforcement_rules.name: empty_input_rejection
enforcement_rules.description: When user message is empty or whitespace-only, reject with 400 (does not increment turn count)

response_body.message: Please describe what you're stuck on.

server_side_only.description: All limits enforced server-side. Client-side timers are cosmetic only.
server_side_only.rationale: Client cannot override. Server is the authority.
server_side_only.implementation: enforceSessionLimits() runs before every LLM call in POST /api/v1/session/{id}/message

response_latency.enforcement: If avg > 3.0s for 7 consecutive days, downgrade prompt complexity or switch to lighter model

session_success_rate.enforcement: If ratio < 0.95 for 3 consecutive days, alert for investigation

context_gate_pass_rate.enforcement: If ratio < 0.70 for 7 consecutive days, review LLM prompt effectiveness

payment_processing.pci_compliance: All card data handled by Stripe. No card data touches our servers.

session_controller.turn_tracking: llm_call_count increments on each successful LLM response

session_complete.description: Turn limit reached (max 2 LLM calls for trial tier)
session_complete.client_action: Show session complete message, disable input

session_timeout.description: Session timer expired (120s for trial tier)
session_timeout.client_action: Show timeout message, prompt new session
